rationale: Romania directly borders Moldova and Ukraine; the formal EU accession launch for both neighbors is the most impactful new development, with direct implications for regional stability, migration, and Romania's geopolitical role.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Romania shares borders with both Moldova and Ukraine; their formal EU accession process start has direct implications for regional stability, cross-border migration flows, and Romania's strategic importance within the EU.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: A qualitative new admission from Putin suggesting Russian capacity erosion is relevant to Romania's Black Sea security calculus, though no direct regional incident occurred.

top_events.title: Iran deal signals: Hormuz reopening and UAE unfreezing Iranian funds
top_events.summary: Incremental Iran deal progress could ease energy prices for Romanian consumers indirectly, but no final agreement and no immediate market impact confirmed.
